questions.question: Could you help me move this desk to the corner?
Why don't we grab a coffee before the meeting starts?
options: (A) I just had one, but thanks.

questions.question: Would you mind checking these figures for me?
options: (C) The check is in the mail.

questions.question: Could you tell me where the nearest post office is?
options: (C) I'm sorry, I'm not from around here.

questions.question: Why don't we take a taxi instead of the bus?
options: (A) That sounds like a faster option.
(B) The bus stop is over there.

questions.question: Would you like to join us for dinner tonight?
options: (B) I'm afraid I have other plans.

questions.question: Could you lower the volume of the radio?
options: (A) Yes, I'll turn it down right away.

questions.question: Why don't we postpone the deadline until Friday?
options: (C) That would be a huge relief.

questions.question: Would you prefer to meet in the morning or the afternoon?
options: (A) Afternoon would be better for me.

questions.question: Could you sign this delivery receipt, please?
options: (B) Of course, do you have a pen?

questions.question: Why don't we ask Mr. Kim for his opinion?
options: (A) He's out of the office today.

questions.question: Would you be able to give me a lift to the airport?
options: (C) My car is in the shop, unfortunately.

questions.question: Could you pass me the stapler?
Why don't we try that new Italian place down the street?
options: (B) I've heard their pasta is great.

questions.question: Would you please send the invoice to the accounting department?
options: (A) I'll do it first thing tomorrow.

questions.question: Could you remind me when the presentation begins?
Why don't we double-check the guest list?
options: (C) Good idea, let's do that now.

questions.question: Would you like me to take your coat?
Could you show me how to use the photocopier?
Why don't we hire a consultant to help with the marketing?
options: (A) Our budget is a bit tight right now.

questions.question: Would you mind waiting in the lobby for a few minutes?
options: (A) The lobby is on the first floor.
(B) I've been waiting for an hour.

questions.question: Could you provide me with a copy of the annual report?
options: (A) I'll print one out for you.
(B) It was a very long year.

questions.question: Why don't we take a short break?
options: (A) We only have ten minutes left.

questions.question: Would you like a refill on your water?
Could you tell Mr. Henderson that I called?
This printer is out of ink again, isn't it?
options: (B) I'll take care of it right away.

questions.question: Mr. Henderson hasn't signed the contract yet.
options: (A) At the bottom of the page.
(B) Yes, he's a very good designer.
(C) I didn't know that. I'll call him.

questions.question: We should probably leave for the airport now.
options: (A) I agree; the traffic is getting heavy.
(B) The flight was delayed by two hours.
(C) No, I haven't seen my passport.

questions.question: You've finished the quarterly report, haven't you?
options: (C) Actually, I still have two pages left.

questions.question: The cafeteria is closed for renovations this week.
options: (B) That explains why the doors were locked.

questions.question: Sarah is the one in charge of the marketing campaign.
options: (C) Oh, I thought it was Mark.

questions.question: You didn't remember to bring the extra chairs, did you?
options: (B) I'm sorry, it completely slipped my mind.
(C) There are four people in the meeting.

questions.question: This client prefers to be contacted via email.
options: (B) His office is on the fifth floor.

questions.question: The lecture starts at 10:00, doesn't it?
options: (A) No, it's been pushed back to 10:30.
(C) It was a very long walk.

questions.question: We're running low on shipping supplies.
options: (B) They are on the top shelf.
(C) I'll place an order this afternoon.

questions.question: You've already met the new intern, haven't you?
options: (A) Yes, we had lunch together yesterday.
(B) He's looking for a permanent job.

questions.question: I'm afraid the elevator is still out of order.
options: (C) I guess I'll have to take the stairs.

questions.question: The budget proposal needs to be submitted by Friday.
You aren't going to the retirement party, are you?
options: (A) He has worked here for thirty years.
(C) No, I have a previous engagement.

questions.question: It's much colder in the office today than usual.
Ms. Kim didn't leave her umbrella here, did she?
options: (C) She's at a conference in Seoul.

questions.question: There's a typo on the first page of the brochure.
options: (C) I'll fix it before we print the rest.

I think we should reschedule our meeting for Tuesday.

options: (A) I'm using it at my desk.
(C) No, I haven't seen that movie.

questions.question: The commute is much faster if you take the express train.
We don't have enough copies of the agenda for everyone.
This software update is taking much longer than expected.
options: (B) Tell me about it; it's been an hour!

We have a lot of work to finish before the deadline.
options: (A) I'm happy to stay late and help.

options: (A) It's held at the Grand Hotel.
(B) Ms. Gable from the events team.

When will the technician arrive to fix the server?
Who did you speak with at the insurance agency?
options: (A) I talked to a representative named Sarah.

options: (B) They are on the architect's desk.

questions.question: When is the next flight to Singapore departing?

(B) It was a very close race.

Who should I contact if I need a password reset?

(B) I need to withdraw some cash.

options: (B) According to the news, by October.
(C) It's causing a lot of traffic.

Who is going to lead the training session today?
Where can I park my car during the interview?

options: (C) I saw it on the breakroom wall this morning.

Where are the scissors I borrowed from you?

questions.question: When is the most convenient time for us to meet?
options: (B) It was a very productive meeting.

questions.question: Who authorized this expense report?
Where do you usually go for your lunch break?
options: (A) To the park if the weather is nice.

questions.question: When was the company founded?
Who left this umbrella in the hallway?
options: (A) It might belong to the receptionist.

options: (A) Because they are installing new kitchen equipment.
(B) I usually have a salad for lunch.

questions.question: How do I register for the upcoming leadership seminar?
options: (B) You can sign up through the company portal.
(C) No, I didn't see the sign.

options: (A) He had to catch an international flight.
(B) It was held in the grand ballroom.
(C) Yes, quite a bit earlier than expected.

questions.question: How soon can we expect the shipment of office chairs?
options: (A) They are made of recycled materials.
(B) By the end of business tomorrow.
(C) The supplier said they will arrive by Friday.

options: (A) The original room's projector is broken.

questions.question: How often does the shuttle bus run to the airport?
options: (C) Every twenty minutes on the hour.

options: (A) I'll send them a follow-up email right now.
(B) They were very satisfied with the results.
(C) No, it's not on the back page.

options: (B) It was surprisingly within our budget.

questions.question: Why are you taking the stairs instead of the elevator?
options: (A) The elevator is being serviced today.
(B) On the fourth floor, turn left.

options: (A) They hired an outside design agency.
(B) It's much brighter than the old one.

questions.question: Why is the commute taking so much longer this morning?
options: (B) There is major construction on the highway.
(C) It's about ten miles from here.

questions.question: How do you like the new office layout?
options: (B) It's much more collaborative and open.
(C) I think it is a huge improvement.

questions.question: Why did you decide to reschedule the interview?
options: (A) The candidate has a scheduling conflict.

questions.question: How can we reduce our energy consumption this month?
options: (A) By turning off lights in empty rooms.
(B) The electric bill was very high.

questions.question: Why is the ventilation system making that loud noise?
options: (A) I'll call the maintenance crew to check it.
(B) No, it isn't very loud in here.

questions.question: How did you hear about the job opening at our firm?
options: (A) I've worked here for five years.
(B) I saw the advertisement on a professional network.

questions.question: Why wasn't the budget proposal approved?
options: (A) We need to provide more cost details.
(B) It's in the blue folder on your desk.

questions.question: How long does it take to process a travel reimbursement?
options: (A) About two weeks from the date of submission.
(B) It was a very expensive trip.

questions.question: Why are the streetlights still on at noon?
options: (A) There must be a timer malfunction.
(C) Because the sensor is likely broken.

questions.question: How many more copies of the agenda do we need?
options: (B) Just five more should be enough.

questions.question: Why did the delivery driver call your mobile phone?
options: (A) He couldn't find the building entrance.

questions.question: How do you want these boxes organized?
options: (A) By the date they were received.
(B) Yes, I'll help you carry them.

options: (A) To help with the increase in seasonal orders.
(B) He works in the human resources office.
(C) To cover the extra evening shifts.

options: (B) It was very smooth and on time.

options: (A) Someone just finished mopping the tiles.
(C) You can sign your name here.

options: (A) He'll be back in ten minutes.

Are you finished with the photocopier?

options: (B) Not yet, it usually comes later.

options: (B) No, I don't have an account.
(C) I need to withdraw some money.

options: (C) No, it's been moved to Monday.

options: (B) Yes, it's a very comfortable chair.

options: (A) I'll be there for a week.

options: (A) No, Sarah hasn't signed it yet.

questions.question: Do you prefer tea or coffee?
options: (C) I usually drink coffee in the morning.

options: (A) I left my umbrella at home.
(B) The forecast says it'll be sunny.

options: (A) No, that would be Ms. Wallace.

options: (A) It arrived via email an hour ago.

options: (A) Not at all, it's a bit cold.
